metadata.title: Michiel Maessen Photography
metadata.description: Professional photography in Oss, Den Bosch, Nijmegen and surroundings. Model, product, webshop and event photography.

home.title: THE TEAM
home.subtitle: Three Michiels. One mission. Images that stick.

michiel1.description: Keeps the paperwork in order. Loves stargazing and sudoku. No invoices without him, and no coffee without invoices.

michiel2.description: Founder with over 20 years of experience. Technically skilled and passionate. Can't stop clicking.

michiel3.description: Team member since 2008. Perfectionist who checks every pixel. Runs on coffee and deadlines.

phone.title: CALL
phone.description: Tap here to call me (works best on your phone).

email.title: EMAIL
email.description: Send me a message, I'd love to hear from you!

location.title: LOCATION
location.serviceAreas: Working in: Oss, Den Bosch, Nijmegen, Uden, Eindhoven, Utrecht and Breda

festival.title: FESTIVAL
festival.description: HipHop in je Smoel. Amazing people. They asked me to shoot some performances at Paaspop for their articles. Couldn't say no. Turned out great.

auto.title: AUTO
auto.description: Automotive photography in collaboration with B&B Designs.

model.title: MODEL
model.description: Shot for MsMode among others. In collaboration with stylist Iris and models: Lottie, Sharon, Fenna, Astrid, Marjolein, Isadee, Diante and Ziarah.

webshop.title: WEBSHOP PHOTOGRAPHY
webshop.description: Professional product photography for webshops and online catalogs.

vrij-werk.title: FREE WORK
vrij-werk.description: Personal work shot with Sacha Mekel at Studio Van Soest in Rotterdam. Great day with amazing results.

footer.serviceAreaText: Photographer Oss · Den Bosch · Nijmegen · Uden · Eindhoven · Utrecht · Breda
